========================================================================
#10696 MULTI-ACCOUNT DOMAIN ARTIFACTS — real path, nothing mocked
========================================================================

--- on-disk tree: <stateDir>/auth/ ---
_pool-metadata.json
anthropic-subscription/
  claude-personal.json
  claude-work.json
openai-codex/
  codex-personal.json
  codex-work.json

--- credential records (distinct token per account) ---
anthropic-subscription/claude-personal.json: id=claude-personal label=claude-personal access=sk-ant-oat-PERSONA…(24 chars) org=-
anthropic-subscription/claude-work.json: id=claude-work label=claude-work access=sk-ant-oat-WORK-bb…(20 chars) org=-
openai-codex/codex-work.json: id=codex-work label=codex-work access=codex-access-WORK-…(22 chars) org=acct_work_5678
openai-codex/codex-personal.json: id=codex-personal label=codex-personal access=codex-access-PERSO…(26 chars) org=acct_personal_1234

--- _pool-metadata.json ---
{
  "anthropic-subscription": {
    "claude-personal": {
      "label": "claude-personal",
      "enabled": true,
      "priority": 0,
      "health": "ok"
    },
    "claude-work": {
      "label": "claude-work",
      "enabled": true,
      "priority": 1,
      "health": "ok"
    }
  },
  "openai-codex": {
    "codex-personal": {
      "label": "codex-personal",
      "enabled": true,
      "priority": 0,
      "health": "ok"
    },
    "codex-work": {
      "label": "codex-work",
      "enabled": true,
      "priority": 1,
      "health": "ok"
    }
  }
}

--- round-robin across 2 Claude accounts (distinct token each turn) ---
  turn 1: account=claude-personal token=sk-ant-oat-PERSONA…(24 chars)
  turn 2: account=claude-work token=sk-ant-oat-WORK-bb…(20 chars)
  turn 3: account=claude-personal token=sk-ant-oat-PERSONA…(24 chars)
  turn 4: account=claude-work token=sk-ant-oat-WORK-bb…(20 chars)

--- per-account CODEX_HOME materialization (no cross-account bleed) ---
  account=codex-personal CODEX_HOME=<stateDir>/auth/_codex-home/codex-personal
    auth.json: auth_mode=chatgpt access=codex-access-PERSO…(26 chars) account_id=acct_personal_1234 id_token=present
  account=codex-work CODEX_HOME=<stateDir>/auth/_codex-home/codex-work
    auth.json: auth_mode=chatgpt access=codex-access-WORK-…(22 chars) account_id=acct_work_5678 id_token=present
  distinct CODEX_HOME dirs: true

--- readiness with a healthy pool (rotation posture: >=2 healthy each) ---
bridge.describe():
{
  "claude": [
    {
      "providerId": "anthropic-subscription",
      "total": 2,
      "enabled": 2,
      "healthy": 2
    },
    {
      "providerId": "anthropic-api",
      "total": 0,
      "enabled": 0,
      "healthy": 0
    }
  ],
  "codex": [
    {
      "providerId": "openai-codex",
      "total": 2,
      "enabled": 2,
      "healthy": 2
    },
    {
      "providerId": "openai-api",
      "total": 0,
      "enabled": 0,
      "healthy": 0
    }
  ],
  "opencode": [
    {
      "providerId": "cerebras-api",
      "total": 0,
      "enabled": 0,
      "healthy": 0
    }
  ]
}
assessCodingAccountReadiness({rotation:true}):
{
  "ready": true,
  "rotation": true,
  "required": 2,
  "providers": [
    {
      "agentType": "claude",
      "total": 2,
      "enabled": 2,
      "healthy": 2,
      "required": 2,
      "ok": true
    },
    {
      "agentType": "codex",
      "total": 2,
      "enabled": 2,
      "healthy": 2,
      "required": 2,
      "ok": true
    }
  ],
  "problems": []
}
  => ready=true (both providers have 2 healthy)

--- rate-limit failover (no dropped request) ---
  priority pick before 429: claude-personal
  after 429 on claude-personal: served claude-work (not dropped) — health of claude-personal=rate-limited

--- loud readiness gate catches the degraded pool (#9960) ---
  ready=false problems=["claude: 1 healthy account(s), need >= 2 (2 connected)"]

========================================================================
PROOF: 2 distinct Claude + 2 distinct Codex accounts on the real
on-disk store; real bridge selection; distinct per-account tokens +
CODEX_HOME (no bleed); round-robin rotation; rate-limit failover with
no dropped request; readiness gate = ready when healthy, and flags
the degraded pool loudly after a 429. Nothing mocked.
========================================================================
